nara.canonical: Female protagonist of a dystopian survival thriller TV series. Late 20s, facial appearance close to a top model: fine balanced features, elegant defined jawline, high cheekbones. Intense intelligent dark eyes exhausted by hardship — determination and contained vulnerability in every feature. No excessive makeup. Natural skin, no airbrushing, visible pores, wet with condensation. Dark hair loosely tied back in a loose bun, wet strands falling at temples and cheeks. She turns her head back over her shoulder, alert sideways gaze. Dark tactical neck scarf wrapped high, weathered dark utility jacket, tactical vest. Lean survival build.

portrait_brief.framing: tight portrait, shoulders to crown, figure slightly turned, head looking back over shoulder at camera — three-quarter profile, alert and watchful
portrait_brief.lighting: cold blue-white industrial fluorescent corridor light from behind — backlit silhouette edge. Cool teal-steel ambient fill. Deep shadow on near cheek. No warm tones. Desaturated cinematic grade.
portrait_brief.background: visible industrial service corridor receding behind her — dense pipes, cable trays, wet metal floor reflecting cool blue-white emergency light, haze in the distance, deep perspective
portrait_brief.dop_ref: Roger Deakins / Sicario corridor chase — cold survival thriller, photorealistic 4K cinematic, NOT fashion editorial

nara.note: Portrait seed: 333. Ref retake v10 — matched to nara_hero_ref_01.png aesthetic: cold blue industrial, over-shoulder gaze, cinematic wide corridor.

mira.canonical: Female deuteragonist, Puerto Rican heritage, 30 years old. Undercut hair with shaved sides and flat top pushed back, unwashed and slightly matted. Almond-shaped green eyes, lean angular face with natural asymmetry, olive-caramel skin with uneven complexion, dark under-eye circles, no makeup. Natural skin texture with clearly visible pores, micro skin irregularities, stress lines under the eyes, real lip texture with natural chapping, faint dust in skin creases, slight redness at nostrils, naturally weathered complexion. Over-shoulder glance, suspicious and calculating, jaw slightly set. Wearing worn dark grey transit worker coverall unzipped to waist, black thermal long-sleeve underneath, signal-relay device clipped to chest strap. Underground signal broker who moves contraband data through ventilation shafts.

portrait_brief.camera: Hasselblad H6D-100c, 85mm f/2.8, shallow depth of field
portrait_brief.framing: portrait, face sharp from hairline to chin, over-shoulder glance
portrait_brief.lighting: three-point: hard cold blue-green industrial key from upper-left at 45 degrees, warm amber CRT fill from right, hair rim light from behind. 60% deep shadow. Practical motivated sources.
portrait_brief.background: soft dark concrete charcoal, shallow depth
portrait_brief.dop_ref: Steve McCurry documentary portrait realism, Anders Petersen candid film photography. Kodak Portra 400 pushed one stop — visible grain on skin, natural halation.

mira.note: LOCKED seed 750 — validé le 2026-05-01. Prompt restructuré selon methode_prompt.md : sujet en premier, 6 blocs ordonnés, zéro formulation négative, Hasselblad au lieu d'ARRI.

elian.canonical: Male character, early 50s — prototype of a man ground down by complicity. Heavy weathered face: deep horizontal forehead lines, prominent nasolabial folds, strong jaw with 4-day salt-and-pepper stubble. Dark hair with a pronounced silver streak above the right temple, pushed back without product, slightly matted at neck. Pale hazel eyes: the face carries suppressed guilt — never holds direct eye contact. Ruddy Northern European complexion, broken capillaries across the nose bridge from decades of physical work. Civilian workwear worn with institutional resignation: heavyweight charcoal wool jacket with collar frayed at both edges, round-neck black thermal underneath. Large hands, knuckles enlarged by valve maintenance. Posture: permanently hunched at the upper back — the body of a man who stopped standing straight years ago.

portrait_brief.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 50mm T2.8, ISO 1600
portrait_brief.framing: tight portrait, shoulders to crown, head centred at 65% height, slightly downcast
portrait_brief.lighting: single warm practical desk lamp 2700K at 30deg camera-right — key on cheek and brow, deep shadows filling left side. No fill. Amber exterior neon seeping through small window behind — minimal separation. 6:1 ratio.
portrait_brief.background: shallow-focus cramped apartment — stacked objects, exposed conduit, small window with condensation
portrait_brief.dop_ref: Cuaron / Children of Men — domestic interior close framing

elian.note: Portrait seed: 44. Ref generated in Phase A.

vale.canonical: Military antagonist, late 40s. Face of controlled institutional menace: clean angular geometry, strong cheekbones, jaw with precisely maintained dark stubble at 1mm. Dark hair, silver-white at both temples, slicked back with visible product, immaculately maintained. Eyes: cold grey-blue irises carrying a quality of genuine absence of empathy — not cruelty, simply zero sentiment. Slightly sallow skin under cold overhead light. Posture: parade-ground rigid at all times, weight centred, arms held precisely at sides. Black tactical command uniform, no insignia except a single slim horizontal silver bar on left chest. High collar, impeccable fit. The face of a system wearing a human body.

portrait_brief.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 50mm T2.8, ISO 800
portrait_brief.framing: tight portrait, shoulders to crown, head centred at 65% height, slight upward gaze — looking down at viewer
portrait_brief.lighting: cold overhead institutional fluorescent — 6500K, hard, flat on upper face. Window behind right shoulder creating cold backlight silhouette edge. No warmth anywhere. 9:1 ratio.
portrait_brief.background: shallow-focus security operations centre — wall of monitors in cold blue glow, analysts as blurred texture
portrait_brief.dop_ref: Fincher / The Social Network — cold corporate interior

vale.note: Portrait seed: 77. Ref generated in Phase A.

rook.canonical: Political antagonist, mid-50s. Face of curated authority: immaculate silver hair swept back with bureaucratic precision, every strand placed. Skin maintained by institutional privilege — too smooth for his age. Narrow pale blue eyes: patient, calculating, the stillness of a predator who never needs to rush. Strong jaw, patrician nose, thin controlled smile that never reaches the eyes. High-authority navy formal wear: precision-cut coat with single polished brass button, no military markings — a civilian who outranks every soldier in the room. Posture: absolute stillness, effortless authority. Never raises voice. Never rushes.

portrait_brief.camera: ARRI Alexa 35, Cooke Anamorphic /i 50mm T2.8, ISO 400
portrait_brief.framing: tight portrait, shoulders to crown, head centred at 65% height
portrait_brief.lighting: clean cold institutional overhead 6500K as key, slight warm practical from a desk lamp at camera-right — 3:1 ratio of cold to warm. Suggesting dual nature: public face warm, true nature cold. 5:1 overall ratio.
portrait_brief.background: shallow-focus immaculate civic interior — marble and glass, public-address screen blurred behind

rook.note: Portrait seed: 55. Ref generated in Phase A.
